### HESUVI: BO7_S3.lnk
### STATUS: Updated 04/05/2026
### NOTES: Clean variant - spatial accuracy, minimal coloring

# --- L R C SUB SL SR RL RR ---
Channel: L R C SUB SL SR RL RR
# @label: Spatial Engine
VSTPlugin: Library "C:\Program Files\VSTPlugins\ReaPlugs\reajs.dll" ChunkData ""
Filter: ON LSC Fc 41 Hz Gain -0.4 dB Q 0.797
Filter: ON PK Fc 4500 Hz Gain -1.0 dB Q 1.500
Filter: ON HSC Fc 6000 Hz Gain 1.5 dB Q 0.800

# --- L R ---
Channel: L R
# @label: Gun Tamer
VSTPlugin: Library "C:\Program Files\VSTPlugins\ReaPlugs\reaxcomp-standalone.dll" ChunkData ""

# --- SL SR RL RR ---
Channel: SL SR RL RR
# @label: Footstep Compressor
VSTPlugin: Library "C:\Program Files\VSTPlugins\ReaPlugs\reaxcomp-standalone.dll" ChunkData ""

# Reset channel scope for HeSuVi
Channel: all
